description: One relevant API timeout chunk is mixed with off-topic product and HR material.
query: What is the default timeout for the Beacon API upload endpoint?

retrieved_chunks.text: The Beacon API upload endpoint uses a default timeout of 30 seconds for a single file upload request.
The Q3 roadmap adds a dark theme, a compact activity feed, and revised notification badges to the dashboard.
Employees accrue one personal day per month after the probation period and must request leave through the staff portal.

final_answer: The Beacon API upload endpoint uses a default timeout of 30 seconds for a single file upload request.
